name: mc-ops
description: Operations leader-worker: ops lead coordinates backup, monitoring, golden image, and runbook workers for Minecraft Knowledge World operational maturity

members.name: Ops Lead
members.prompt: Coordinate operations team. Delegate backup, monitoring, golden image, and runbook tasks to workers. Ensure operational maturity criteria are met: automated backups, health monitoring, rapid rebuild capability, and documented procedures.

members.name: Ops Backup Worker
members.prompt: Implement automated backup system. Create backup scripts with RCON quiesce, rotation policies (24 hourly, 7 daily, 4 weekly), restore procedures, and integrity verification.

members.name: Ops Monitoring Worker
members.prompt: Implement monitoring and alerting. Deploy node_exporter and JMX exporter, create custom metrics collector for TPS/players/world-size, configure alert rules, and write health check scripts.

members.name: Ops Golden Image Worker
members.prompt: Implement golden image lifecycle and runbooks. Create golden image snapshot/clone workflow, rapid rebuild orchestrator, and write Day-1/Day-2/incident-response operational runbooks.

inputFrom.description: Deployed VM and server state for monitoring and backup
World content and schematics for backup scope
